nasb.text: And Jesus, looking around, *said to His disciples, “How hard it will be for those who are wealthy to enter the kingdom of God!”

esv.text: And Jesus looked around and said to his disciples, “How difficult it will be for those who have wealth to enter the kingdom of God!”

cnv.text: 耶穌周圍觀看，對門徒說：“富有的人要進　神的國，是多麼難哪！”

ccb.text: 耶稣看看周围的人，对门徒说：“有钱人进上帝的国真难啊！”

csbs.text: 耶稣环视周围，对他的门徒们说：“有钱财的人进入神的国，是多么困难！”
